openmeter/billing/charges/flatfee/servic.purpose: Implements flatfee.Service: charge creation, state-machine-driven lifecycle advancement, line-engine integration, and invoice event hooks. The orchestration layer — it holds business logic but delegates transition rules to typed StateMachine structs (CreditsOnlyStateMachine, CreditThenInvoiceStateMachine) dispatched by settlement mode; its realizations/ child owns credit allocation/correction persistence only.

patterns.name: Config+Validate before construction
patterns.description: New(config) calls config.Validate() (errors.Join, never panic) and builds flatfeerealizations.Service internally; all dependencies enter through Config.
patterns.example: func New(config Config) (flatfee.Service, error) { if err := config.Validate(); err != nil { return nil, err } ... }

patterns.name: transaction.Run wraps all multi-step adapter calls
patterns.description: Any method that calls the adapter more than once or must be atomic wraps its body in transaction.Run / RunWithNoValue; never call the adapter bare from an exported method.
patterns.example: return transaction.Run(ctx, s.adapter, func(ctx context.Context) ([]flatfee.ChargeWithGatheringLine, error) { ... s.adapter.CreateCharges(ctx, ...) ... })

patterns.name: withLockedCharge for all charge mutations
patterns.description: AdvanceCharge and TriggerPatch open a transaction AND acquire a pg_advisory lock via s.locker.LockForTX before fetching (with ExpandRealizations) and mutating the charge.
patterns.example: return s.withLockedCharge(ctx, input.ChargeID, func(ctx context.Context, charge flatfee.Charge) (*flatfee.Charge, error) { sm, _ := s.newStateMachine(...); return sm.AdvanceUntilStateStable(ctx) })

patterns.name: Settlement-mode dispatch via newStateMachine switch
patterns.description: triggers.go switches on charge.Intent.SettlementMode to build the correct StateMachine subtype; unsupported modes return models.NewGenericNotImplementedError, not fmt.Errorf.

patterns.name: Input.Validate() before any adapter or state-machine call
patterns.description: Every exported method validates its input struct first; use the typed Validate() result rather than raw fmt.Errorf for validation failures.
patterns.example: if err := input.Validate(); err != nil { return nil, err }

patterns.name: Currency rounding before any amount comparison or allocation
patterns.description: Round amounts with currencyCalculator.RoundToPrecision before passing to realizations or comparing; raw DB amounts must not be used in arithmetic.

patterns.name: LineEngine as a thin wrapper over service
patterns.description: LineEngine embeds a *service pointer and delegates heavy work back to service methods; var _ billing.LineEngine = (*LineEngine)(nil) enforces the interface at compile time.

key_file_guides.role: Config, Validate, New constructor; builds flatfeerealizations.Service internally; exposes GetLineEngine(). Single wiring point — all dependencies enter here.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Adding dependencies that bypass Config.Validate; constructing flatfeerealizations.Service anywhere else.

key_file_guides.role: AdvanceCharge, TriggerPatch, newStateMachine, withLockedCharge — all charge lifecycle mutations flow through here.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Any mutation that skips withLockedCharge (missing advisory lock); adding a settlement-mode branch without a corresponding StateMachine type.

key_file_guides.role: Base stateMachine struct, StateMachineConfig, newStateMachineBase; wires Persistence callbacks (UpdateBase, Refetch) to the adapter.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Refetch must always pass ExpandRealizations; omitting it causes stale state in later state-machine steps.

key_file_guides.role: CreditsOnlyStateMachine: Created→Active→Final→Deleted; Final's OnActive runs AllocateCredits then ClearAdvanceAfter.
key_file_guides.watch_for: AllocateCredits calls RoundToPrecision before Realizations — do not remove; DeleteCharge must RefetchCharge after adapter.DeleteCharge.

key_file_guides.role: CreditThenInvoiceStateMachine: multi-step graph with realization, collection, issuing, payment settlement; handles extend/shrink patches with invoice line mutation.
key_file_guides.watch_for: generateInvoicePatches must handle three cases (pre-active no-run, mutable run, immutable run); UnsupportedExtend/ShrinkOperation must return GenericPreConditionFailedError.

key_file_guides.role: billing.LineEngine for LineEngineTypeChargeFlatFee; OnStandardInvoiceCreated / OnInvoiceIssued fire state-machine triggers per line; SplitGatheringLine always errors.
key_file_guides.watch_for: newStateMachineForStandardLine type-asserts to CreditThenInvoiceStateMachine — guard settlement mode before calling so CreditOnly charges don't reach it.

key_file_guides.role: postInvoicePaymentAuthorized / postInvoicePaymentSettled: ledger payment booking wrapped in transaction.RunWithNoValue via handler.OnPaymentAuthorized/OnPaymentSettled.
key_file_guides.watch_for: getPaymentTotal errors if AccruedUsage is nil/zero on fiat-backed runs — do not call it for NoFiatTransactionRequired runs.

key_file_guides.role: populateFlatFeeStandardLineFromRun maps a RealizationRun's detailed lines onto a StandardLine and asserts totals equality.
key_file_guides.watch_for: run.DetailedLines.IsAbsent() check must pass first — always fetch with ExpandRealizations.

anti_patterns: Making charge status transitions inside create.go, payment.go, or lineengine.go — all transitions go through newStateMachine + AdvanceUntilStateStable or FireAndActivate
Calling adapter methods outside a transaction.Run / RunWithNoValue block in any method that writes more than one row
Mutating a charge via AdvanceCharge or TriggerPatch without the advisory lock from withLockedCharge
Using raw (unrounded) currency amounts in allocation or comparison instead of currencyCalculator.RoundToPrecision
Returning fmt.Errorf for unsupported settlement modes instead of models.NewGenericNotImplementedError

decisions.decision: Settlement-mode dispatch at the service layer via newStateMachine switch, not inside the generic statemachine package
decisions.rationale: Each settlement mode has a distinct state graph; keeping dispatch in triggers.go makes it easy to add new modes without modifying shared infrastructure.

decisions.decision: flatfeerealizations.Service is constructed inside New() and never exposed directly
decisions.rationale: Realization mechanics are an implementation detail; callers interact only through flatfee.Service, preventing direct realization calls that bypass lifecycle guards.

decisions.decision: LineEngine is a separate struct holding a pointer to service, not an embedded interface
decisions.rationale: Keeps the billing.LineEngine registration surface separate from the flatfee.Service surface so callers cannot confuse the two responsibilities.

code_examples.scenario: Advancing a flat-fee charge through its state machine under the advisory lock
